patch.value: Audit GitHub issues, PRs, checks, dependency/security reports, full history, package contents, and real preset apply/diff/export/validate workflows. Preserve unrelated work. Keep all presets consolidated in pm-presets with simple branding. Generate CHANGELOG.md and release notes with pm-changelog. Verify daily change-gated GitHub/npm/Bun release automation. Run Greptile before push, then bot review loops to green.
Production hardening and consolidated-preset governance pass 2026-07-09
Deep-test all consolidated pm presets and custom preset paths; align current pm CLI/SDK and pm-changelog; verify archived legacy-preset migration guidance and production release readiness.

Bundled and custom presets validate and are applied/diffed/exported in real workspaces; SDK/activation paths and agent-oriented output are verified; tests/build/typecheck/audit/pack/install/release dry-run pass; archived legacy preset repos are confirmed; privacy/history audit is clean; release automation uses current toolchain and pm-changelog.
Existing feature PR, repo state, gh authentication, pm CLI 2026.7.9, npm metadata, and canonical checkout are available.

value.author: codex-foundation
value.text: Specialized agent started scoped production audit on 2026-07-09; pm-cli source and telemetry/observability configuration are out of scope.

value.author: codex-foundation
value.text: Evidence will include exact commands, linked files/docs/tests, GitHub review disposition, package tarball verification, real workspace fixtures, and path-only sensitive-data scan summaries.

author: codex-foundation
message: Specialized foundation agent resumes production hardening

author: codex-foundation

value.author: codex-foundation
value.text: 2026-07-09 scope checkpoint: inventorying GitHub reports, current PR branch, dependency versions, release automation, package activation, real-workspace behavior, and full-history privacy posture before implementation.

value.author: codex-foundation
value.text: Toolchain baseline is global pm CLI 2026.7.9. Required package target is @unbrained/pm-cli 2026.7.9 and pm-changelog 2026.7.8 after registry verification. No telemetry/observability changes are authorized.
